name: consorcio-canalero
description: Sistema de gestion para Consorcio Canalero 10 de Mayo - Bell Ville

scripts.test:smoke:frontend: cd consorcio-web && npm run test:run -- tests/unit/api.test.ts
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd gee-backend && export RUFF_NO_CACHE=true && if [ -x ./venv/bin/ruff ]; then ./venv/bin/ruff check app/ && ./venv/bin/ruff format app/ --check; elif command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check app/ && ruff format app/ --check; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -m ruff check app/ && python3 -m ruff format app/ --check; else echo ruff not found >&2; exit 127; fi
scripts.quality:backend: cd gee-backend && ruff check . && mypy app/ --ignore-missing-imports && python3 -m pytest tests/new/ -q
scripts.quality:frontend: cd consorcio-web && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:run -- tests/unit/api.test.ts

author: Consorcio Canalero 10 de Mayo
